raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying that the described motivation, method, training setup, evaluation, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The conclusion that the neural ranker outperforms the baselines depends directly on whether the reported MRR and precision-at-one numbers support that claim.","R1.6":"The artifact contains conspicuous sentence- and paragraph-level repetition, making writing polish the most load-bearing responsibility for a generic check request.","RX.1":"Any check should disclose uncertainty because the excerpt provides only local context and not the full paper or experimental details.","RX.2":"The projection must include guarding against claims stronger than the reported results justify, especially around outperforming the cross-encoder baseline.","RX.3":"The responsibility should remain limited to checking the provided paper excerpt rather than executing edits or evaluating unavailable external materials.","RX.4":"The check should avoid downstream harm by not encouraging misleading presentation of model performance or unsupported methodological claims.","RX.5":"The check should preserve traceability to the artifact’s stated claims, metrics, baselines, and wording."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying that the described motivation, method, training setup, evaluation, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The conclusion that the neural ranker outperforms the baselines depends directly on whether the reported MRR and precision-at-one numbers support that claim.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact contains conspicuous sentence- and paragraph-level repetition, making writing polish the most load-bearing responsibility for a generic check request.
rationale.RX.1: Any check should disclose uncertainty because the excerpt provides only local context and not the full paper or experimental details.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must include guarding against claims stronger than the reported results justify, especially around outperforming the cross-encoder baseline.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility should remain limited to checking the provided paper excerpt rather than executing edits or evaluating unavailable external materials.
rationale.RX.4: The check should avoid downstream harm by not encouraging misleading presentation of model performance or unsupported methodological claims.
rationale.RX.5: The check should preserve traceability to the artifact’s stated claims, metrics, baselines, and wording.
